channel.title: Frontity on Ngnix Cloudways: router seems to be picking up index.php
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->
The application seems to be working without any issue when serving, but the issue i'm having is that when I visit the homepage the router seems to be pointing to /index.php/
If I visit domain.com/about first and then click on the homepage link then the page loads fine and the router seems to be pointing to '/'
Not sure if anyone else had this same issue and know how to resolve this?
If anyone can help me that would be great.
Thank you :)

item.title: Frontity on Ngnix Cloudways: router seems to be picking up index.php
item.dc:creator: harsh
item.description:
Anyone who can help me with this please?

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity on Ngnix Cloudways: router seems to be picking up index.php

item.title: Frontity on Ngnix Cloudways: router seems to be picking up index.php
item.dc:creator: harsh
item.description:
The application seems to be working without any issue when serving, but the issue i’m having is that when I visit the homepage the router seems to be pointing to /index.php/

If I visit About Us - Domain.com first and then click on the homepage link then the page loads fine and the router seems to be pointing to ‘/’

Not sure if anyone else had this same issue and know how to resolve this?

If anyone can help me that would be great.

Thank you

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity on Ngnix Cloudways: router seems to be picking up index.php
